title: Fix admin page authentication gate blocking access

requirements.summary: Remove all authentication checks and login gates from AdminPage.tsx to allow immediate public access to the /admin route
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin in a fresh browser session (not logged in) renders the admin page immediately with no login prompt or access-denied message
All booking submissions are fetched and displayed without any authentication step
No conditional rendering based on login/auth state exists in AdminPage.tsx
The page shows a loading indicator while submissions are being fetched
The page shows an empty-state message when no submissions exist
The page shows an error message if the query fails

file_operations.description: Remove all imports and usage of useInternetIdentity hook. Remove all conditional rendering based on isAuthenticated or identity state. Remove any login/logout UI components. Ensure useGetAllSubmissions is called unconditionally and the submissions list renders immediately when data is available. Keep loading, error, and empty-state UI but remove any authentication-gated rendering.

requirements.summary: Update useGetAllSubmissions hook to use an anonymous actor without any Internet Identity dependency
acceptanceCriteria: useGetAllSubmissions does not import or use useInternetIdentity or any authenticated actor
The hook uses an anonymous HttpAgent to instantiate the backend actor
The query executes automatically without a manual trigger
Both empty arrays and populated arrays are handled correctly without runtime errors
The returned data is correctly typed and accessible in AdminPage.tsx

file_operations.description: Modify useGetAllSubmissions to create an anonymous HttpAgent using @dfinity/agent and instantiate the backend actor directly without depending on useActor hook or any authenticated identity. Import Actor from @dfinity/agent and canisterId/idlFactory from the backend declarations. Ensure the query runs automatically with enabled: true and properly returns the array of BookingSubmission objects from getAllSubmissions().
